projects.title: Portfolio Website (highcarlsagan.dev)
projects.description_short: Personal portfolio + resume site at highcarlsagan.dev
projects.description_long: Dark navy portfolio with Share Tech Mono / Syne / DM Sans typography. Resume at resume.highcarlsagan.dev with Inter typography and PDF print support. Four design variants explored (main, retro terminal, glassmorphism, Expanse-inspired).

projects.title: Self-Hosted Homelab
projects.description_short: Raspberry Pi 4 with Caddy, Authelia, Tailscale, Pi-hole, Home Assistant
projects.description_long: Raspberry Pi 4 at 192.168.0.100. Stack: Caddy + Authelia + cloudflared + Tailscale + Pi-hole (Docker) + Home Assistant + qBittorrent + Filebrowser. Domain highcarlsagan.dev on Cloudflare with active tunnel. Career dashboard and outreach templates deployed as additional subdomains.
projects.tech_stack: Raspberry Pi, Caddy, Authelia, Docker, Tailscale, Cloudflare

projects.title: Arch Linux + Hyprland Setup
projects.description_short: Cyberpunk-themed Hyprland rice on Arch Linux daily driver
projects.description_long: Hyprland 0.54.2 on dual monitors (Samsung DP-3 primary, BenQ HDMI). AMD Ryzen 16-core + RX 9070 XT. Full Waybar cyberpunk theme with GPU/CPU monitoring scripts and popup overlays. Hyprpaper replaced with awww. KiCad 10, VS Code, dual git config (personal + work).
projects.tech_stack: Arch Linux, Hyprland, Waybar, Rofi, Dunst, awww

projects.title: Dual Rail Power Supply
projects.description_short: 5V + 3V3 benchtop PSU, 60W total, LM70880-based
projects.description_long: Dual-rail benchtop power supply for testing. AC-DC converter with LM70880 output. Pure analog hardware. Boards in hand and tested.

projects.title: PC and Light Controller
projects.description_short: ESP32 Wi-Fi controller for UPS + room decor lights
projects.description_long: Controls UPS and room decor lights. Simple motor + relay operation over ESP32 Wi-Fi. Integrates with Telegram bot for remote control. Servo-based UPS control.

projects.title: OakBridge MkI
projects.description_short: ESP32-S3 + IPS display PC interface card; system stats, music, photos
projects.description_long: USB-controlled device with ESP32-S3-WROOM-1-N16R8, 3.5" ILI9488 display, FRAM, SD card, rotary encoder, Cherry MX switches, USB-C. Shows system stats (temps, usage), music player with volume/navigation, and photo/git cheatsheet display modes. PCBs in hand, soldering started. Enclosure design pending.
projects.tech_stack: ESP32-S3, ILI9488, FRAM, Cherry MX, USB-C, KiCad

projects.title: VOL-1 Volumetric POV Display
projects.description_short: True 3D volumetric persistence-of-vision display
projects.description_long: ESP32-S3 Mini rotor driving APA102C LED matrix. STM32G031 base station. Wireless inductive power (Qi 5W) to spinning rotor. TCRT5000 IR angular encoder. RF-300CA motor. BQ25895 USB-C charging. Key challenges: high-speed power delivery to rotating assembly and precise rotational synchronization. PCBs out for manufacture.
projects.tech_stack: ESP32-S3, STM32G031, APA102C, Qi wireless, KiCad

projects.title: Active Clamp Forward 300W SMPS
projects.description_short: 300W active clamp forward converter, 0–60V CV/CC/CP output
projects.description_long: 300W active clamp forward SMPS, intended as openly published reference design — the kind textbooks describe but rarely show end-to-end. PFC front end, custom magnetics, digital supervisor (STM32G474). 0–60V CV/CC/CP output.
projects.tech_stack: Active clamp forward, STM32G474, custom magnetics, PFC

projects.title: 1kW Converter (Topology TBD)
projects.description_short: Long-term flagship 1kW converter; topology to be selected later
projects.description_long: Long-term aspirational 1kW converter project. Topology TBD — candidates: full-bridge LLC, dual-active-bridge, interleaved PSFB. Will be tackled after 300W active clamp forward is complete and lessons internalized. Goal: a serious flagship power electronics design.

projects.title: 500W Programmable E-Load
projects.description_short: Programmable electronic load — CC, CV, CR, CP modes
projects.description_long: Bench-grade programmable electronic load. CC/CV/CR/CP modes. Anchors the test bench infrastructure for testing all future power electronics work.
projects.tech_stack: MOSFET array, control loop, MCU TBD

projects.title: Nano Voltmeter + Pico Ammeter
projects.description_short: High-precision joint voltage + current measurement instrument
projects.description_long: High-precision joint design — nanovolt voltmeter + picoamp ammeter in single instrument. For low-noise measurements during converter loop characterization and sensor work.

projects.title: Function Generator
projects.description_short: Bench function/signal generator
projects.description_long: DDS-based bench function generator. Sine, square, triangle, sweep modes. Part of the test bench infrastructure.
projects.tech_stack: DDS, AD9833 or similar, MCU + display

projects.title: SDR (Analog Front End)
projects.description_short: Analog SDR — quadrature, AGC, variable filters
projects.description_long: Analog software-defined radio front end. Quadrature mixing, analog AGC loop, variable IF filters. Pairs with hydrogen line radio telescope build later.

projects.title: EMI Lab
projects.description_short: DIY EMI test setup — LISN, near-field probes, RX front end
projects.description_long: Long-term: DIY EMI compliance test bench. LISN, near-field probes, EMI receiver front end. For pre-compliance testing of own power electronics designs.

projects.title: Reflow Station
projects.description_short: DIY reflow oven/hotplate controller
projects.description_long: DIY reflow oven or hotplate controller for SMD assembly. Will simplify all future hardware bringups.

projects.title: Bidirectional Battery Emulator
projects.description_short: Buck-boost battery emulator with regen braking, V/I-mode control
projects.description_long: Bidirectional buck-boost battery emulator. Regen braking, current and voltage mode control, thermal foldback. Useful for EV/automotive and satellite EPS testing.

projects.title: Reaction Wheel
projects.description_short: High-speed BLDC reaction wheel; encoder + low vibration
projects.description_long: High-speed BLDC motor with low-vibration mechanical design and high-resolution encoder. Educational AOCS-style demonstrator. Ties to professional satellite work.

projects.title: LIDAR Scanner
projects.description_short: Laser driver + APD front end + timing circuits
projects.description_long: Time-of-flight LIDAR scanner. Laser driver, APD front end, sub-nanosecond timing circuits. Mechanical scanning (galvo or rotating mirror).

projects.title: Magnetic Levitation System
projects.description_short: Hall feedback maglev with high-speed current control
projects.description_long: Magnetic levitation demonstrator. Hall-effect feedback, high-speed current control, stability compensation. Pure control systems exercise — practical and visually impressive.
projects.tech_stack: Hall sensor, MCU, MOSFET driver, control loop

projects.title: MIDI Device
projects.description_short: First audio build — gateway to modular synth bench
projects.description_long: First audio electronics build. MIDI controller — knobs, pads, keys. Designed as the gateway project to a full Erica Synths EDU modular synth bench in the future.

projects.title: Full Modular Synth Setup
projects.description_short: Erica Synths EDU path modular synth bench
projects.description_long: Long-term: full modular synth bench based on Erica Synths EDU kit progression. Start with Eurorack utility module (VCA, mixer, attenuverter) then expand.

projects.title: Eurorack Utility Module
projects.description_short: First Eurorack module — VCA / mixer / attenuverter
projects.description_long: First Eurorack module to companion the Erica Synths EDU progression. VCA, mixer, or attenuverter — gentle entry to modular synthesis hardware design.

projects.title: Theremin / Capacitive Gesture Synth
projects.description_short: Antenna-based pitch + volume control synth
projects.description_long: Theremin or capacitive-antenna gesture synthesizer. Pitch + volume controlled by hand proximity to two antennas. Bridges audio bench and wearables/gesture skill set.

projects.title: LED Earrings
projects.description_short: Blade Runner 2049 / Mitxela style LED earrings
projects.description_long: Tiny LED earrings inspired by Blade Runner 2049 and Mitxela's work. Coin cell powered, animated.

projects.title: LED Matrix Amulet
projects.description_short: Small LED matrix wearable amulet
projects.description_long: Small wearable LED matrix amulet. Animated patterns, simple battery powered.

projects.title: Lub / Love Pointer
projects.description_short: Jack Sparrow's compass — points to thing you want most
projects.description_long: Jack Sparrow's compass tribute. Points to the thing you want most — partner, coffee, pizza, anything. LED arrow or servo-driven dial.

projects.title: Techies Watch / Calculator
projects.description_short: Wearable techie watch with calculator
projects.description_long: Wearable techie watch with built-in scientific calculator. Reverse Polish style, e-ink or OLED display.

projects.title: Gift Project (AVR)
projects.description_short: Low-priority AVR-based gift design
projects.description_long: Low-priority AVR-based small project as a gift.

projects.title: Pass The Butter
projects.description_short: Rick and Morty homage robot
projects.description_long: Rick and Morty homage robot. Single-purpose: pass the butter.

projects.title: NavMap (Cycle Navigation)
projects.description_short: Navigation map device for cycling
projects.description_long: Handlebar-mounted cycle navigation device. GPS, e-ink display, route loading from phone, weatherproof.

projects.title: FPV Drone
projects.description_short: Small, achievable FPV drone build
projects.description_long: Small FPV drone. Tinywhoop or 3-inch class. Build experience in motors, ESCs, flight controllers, video TX.

projects.title: B2EMO
projects.description_short: Star Wars Andor B2EMO tribute robot
projects.description_long: Long-term: full B2EMO tribute robot from Star Wars Andor. Deformable body, dome animations, voice, treads.

projects.title: Wall-E
projects.description_short: Wall-E tribute robot
projects.description_long: Long-term: Wall-E tribute robot. Treads, expressive eyes, manipulator arms.

projects.title: 12" f/5 Dobsonian Telescope
projects.description_short: Backyard nebula-accuracy 12-inch f/5 Dobsonian build
projects.description_long: 12" f/5 Dobsonian telescope for backyard observation. Nebula-resolution accuracy. Documented on GitHub. Slow project — updates when there's something worth showing.

projects.title: Star Tracker
projects.description_short: Sidereal star tracker for telescope/astrophotography
projects.description_long: Sidereal-rate star tracker for astrophotography. Stepper-driven, computed sidereal compensation, polar alignment aid.

projects.title: Geiger Counter
projects.description_short: First instrument in 8-year backyard physics roadmap
projects.description_long: Geiger-Müller tube based radiation detector. First instrument in the 8-year backyard physics roadmap. Documented for replication by Indian maker community.

projects.title: Fluxgate Magnetometer
projects.description_short: Geomagnetic field measurement instrument
projects.description_long: Fluxgate magnetometer for backyard geomagnetic field measurement. Detects geomagnetic storms, solar activity proxy. Phase 2 of physics roadmap.

projects.title: Cloud Chamber
projects.description_short: Visualize cosmic rays and radioactive decay
projects.description_long: Diffusion cloud chamber to visualize cosmic ray tracks and radioactive decay particles. Peltier-cooled isopropanol vapor.

projects.title: SiPM Muon Detector
projects.description_short: Cosmic ray muon coincidence detector
projects.description_long: Silicon photomultiplier-based cosmic ray muon detector. Coincidence circuit between two SiPMs and scintillators. Records muon flux variations.

projects.title: Hydrogen Line Radio Telescope (1420 MHz)
projects.description_short: Backyard 1420 MHz H-line radio telescope
projects.description_long: Backyard hydrogen line radio telescope at 1420 MHz. Antenna + LNA + SDR pipeline. Detects neutral hydrogen in the Milky Way. Capstone of physics roadmap.
projects.tech_stack: Horn antenna, LNA, SDR, signal processing

projects.title: APOD on Hyprland
projects.description_short: Daily NASA APOD as Hyprland wallpaper
projects.description_long: Pull NASA Astronomy Picture of the Day daily and set as Hyprland wallpaper via awww. Small daemon with caching, fallback on network failure, optional explanation overlay.
projects.tech_stack: Python, NASA API, awww, systemd timer

projects.title: Near-Earth Almanac
projects.description_short: Daily/weekly almanac of NEOs, passes, observable events
projects.description_long: Daily and weekly almanac of near-Earth objects, satellite passes, ISS, observable astronomical events. Web dashboard, optional email digest.

projects.title: LGM Revival with TESS
projects.description_short: Re-examine TESS data for anomalous periodic signals
projects.description_long: Re-examine TESS light curves for anomalous periodic signals (LGM-style — Little Green Men hypothesis revival). Statistical search for non-astrophysical periodicities.

projects.title: SEP Radiation Nowcaster
projects.description_short: Real-time solar energetic particle dose forecaster
projects.description_long: Real-time solar energetic particle (SEP) event nowcaster — forecasts radiation dose for satellites in LEO/MEO/GEO. Ties directly to professional satellite radiation work.
projects.tech_stack: Python, NOAA SWPC, GOES data, ML

projects.title: Supernova Classifier
projects.description_short: ML classifier for supernova spectra/light curves
projects.description_long: ML-based supernova classifier from light curves and/or spectra. Type Ia / Ib/c / II / IIn classification. Public datasets (ZTF, Pan-STARRS, etc.).

projects.title: TESS Candidate Triage Broker
projects.description_short: Automated triage broker for TESS exoplanet/transient candidates
projects.description_long: Automated triage broker for TESS exoplanet and transient candidates. Filters by signal-to-noise, vetting flags, follow-up priority. Web dashboard.

projects.title: Satellite Power & Radiation Sizing Tool
projects.description_short: Streamlit + Orekit + SHIELDOSE-2 power/radiation sizing for spacecraft
projects.description_long: Spacecraft power sizing and radiation environment tool. Orekit for orbit propagation, SHIELDOSE-2 for TID, AP-8/AE-8 trapped particle models. Covers battery and solar array sizing, eclipse duration, radiation effects for LEO missions. Intentionally excludes ITAR-restricted models. Currently being rebuilt from scratch with cleaner architecture.

projects.title: FPGA / VLSI → Tiny Tapeout
projects.description_short: 24-week FPGA learning roadmap leading to Tiny Tapeout 2028
projects.description_long: Long-term silicon track. 24-week FPGA learning roadmap on Basys 3 (Artix-7, Vivado). Leads to Tiny Tapeout submission target 2028. Slow weekend reading + project pace.

projects.title: KiCad WACA Plugin
projects.description_short: Worst-case analysis plugin for KiCad
projects.description_long: KiCad worst-case analysis plugin. Python + pcbnew API, wxPython GUI, SQLite component database. Derating standards (FIDES, MIL-HDBK-217, NASA). 12-week sprint plan.

projects.title: Pineapple Beer
projects.description_short: Homebrew pineapple beer
projects.description_long: Homebrew pineapple beer. Fun food project.

projects.title: GoKart
projects.description_short: DIY go-kart build
projects.description_long: DIY go-kart build. Frame, drivetrain, electrics. Long-term mechanical project.

projects.title: Room-Wide LED Mesh Controller
projects.description_short: ESP32 hub + WLED satellite nodes for full-room LED control
projects.description_long: Central ESP32 hub coordinating multiple ESP32-based satellite nodes. Each node drives a strip in a different zone (ceiling, desk, behind bed, behind TV). WLED firmware on satellites. Web UI + MQTT for everything else (music sync, motion, voice) to integrate with.

projects.title: Music-Synced FFT Engine
projects.description_short: INMP441 mic → ESP32-S3 FFT → drives LED zones with bass/mid/treble + beat detection
projects.description_long: INMP441 I²S microphone samples ambient room audio. ESP32-S3 runs real-time FFT, splits into bass/mid/treble bands, beat detection. Pushes commands to LED mesh hub. Works for any music source because it listens to the room.

projects.title: Sunrise / Circadian Layer
projects.description_short: Background scheduler — color temperature shifts across day, sunrise wake-up
projects.description_long: Background scheduler that slowly shifts LED color temperature across the day — cool blue-white morning, neutral midday, warm amber evening. Wake-up ramp: 30 minutes before alarm, bedroom zone fades from off to warm sunrise.

projects.title: Door / Motion-Aware Automation (optional)
projects.description_short: PIR + mmWave presence detection driving scene fades — TENTATIVE
projects.description_long: TENTATIVE — flagged optional. PIR detects movement, mmWave (LD2410) detects presence. Combined: room knows when you enter, leave, or are sitting still. Triggers scene fades — walk in → warm light, sit at desk → desk zone brightens, leave → all off. Tied into Home Assistant.

projects.title: Hybrid Star + Nebula Projector
projects.description_short: Galvo-driven 1000-2000 stars + nebula backdrop projector
projects.description_long: Hybrid two-layer ceiling planetarium. Background layer: real Hubble/JWST nebula imagery on transparency or short-throw projector slide, slightly desaturated. Foreground layer: 1000-2000 stars from Hipparcos/Yale Bright Star Catalog projected via galvo laser. Programmable — sidereal rotation, constellation highlighting, deep-sky markers. Solar system mode includes Petrova line projection.
projects.tech_stack: Galvo mirrors, laser, projector module, Python control

projects.title: Petrova Line Acoustic Levitator (PHM)
projects.description_short: 40kHz transducer array — Project Hail Mary Petrova line tribute
projects.description_long: Project Hail Mary Petrova line tribute. Vertical standing wave column with multiple nodes, each holding a fluorescing particle (UV-reactive dust or microspheres), illuminated from below with UV. Recreates the Petrova line visual — glowing column of suspended particles. Companion to the star projector's system-scale Petrova line in solar system mode.

projects.title: F1 Live Telemetry Dashboard
projects.description_short: F1 Live Timing API → Pi/ESP32 + screen showing tyre, gap, sector deltas live
projects.description_long: Live F1 telemetry dashboard. Pulls from F1 Live Timing API and FastF1. Shows current tyre compound, gaps between drivers, sector deltas, fastest lap, in real time during sessions. Pi or ESP32-driven display.
projects.tech_stack: Python, FastF1, ESP32 or Pi, display

projects.title: F1 Race Weekend Desk Clock
projects.description_short: E-ink countdown clock for FP1/Quali/Race in your timezone
projects.description_long: Desk-mounted e-ink countdown clock. Shows time until next session (FP1, Quali, Sprint, Race) auto-pulled from calendar. Always-on, low power.

projects.title: F1 Driver Radio Scanner Box
projects.description_short: Pulls team radio clips during race, plays through speaker with driver name
projects.description_long: Pulls team radio clips from the live F1 broadcast or post-session, plays through small speaker. Display shows driver name and team color when active. Fun race-day desk gadget.
projects.tech_stack: Pi, audio output, F1 data scraper, display

projects.title: Live IRCTC Departure Board
projects.description_short: Split-flap or e-ink board showing live trains from nearest station
projects.description_long: Live departure board showing trains from nearest station. Split-flap mechanical version (clacks like a real one) or e-ink. Pulls from IRCTC public APIs.
projects.tech_stack: ESP32, split-flap or e-ink, IRCTC API

projects.title: Train Horn Synthesizer
projects.description_short: WAG/WDP horn signature synthesizer with pull cord
projects.description_long: Train horn synthesizer recreating Indian Railways WAG/WDP loco horn signatures. Pull cord triggers actual sample. Mounted on wall, foot or hand triggered.
projects.tech_stack: MCU, sample player, audio, mechanical pull

projects.title: Station Announcement Box
projects.description_short: Auto-generates 'train number X arriving on platform Y' in Hindi/English
projects.description_long: Station announcement box. Auto-generates 'train number X arriving on platform Y' announcements in Hindi, English, and local language. Plays the iconic Indian Railways jingle. TTS or pre-recorded clips.

projects.title: Railfan Logbook
projects.description_short: GPS + camera trigger: log every train spotted with location, time, loco class
projects.description_long: Portable railfan logbook. GPS for location, camera trigger button, optional ML loco classifier. Logs every train spotted with location, timestamp, loco class identifier.

projects.title: Pantograph Arc Light
projects.description_short: Cosmetic ceiling light shaped like a catenary section, sparks LED on trigger
projects.description_long: Cosmetic ceiling lamp shaped like a railway catenary section with pantograph. LED 'sparks' triggered on demand. Ambient lighting + railway aesthetic.

projects.title: Loco Shed Status Board
projects.description_short: LEDs for each Indian loco class spotted — collection tracker
projects.description_long: Wall-mounted board with LEDs for each Indian Railways loco class (WAG-7, WAG-9, WDP-4, WAP-5, WAP-7, etc.). Light up as you collect spottings. Pairs with railfan logbook.

projects.title: Mini Steam Whistle
projects.description_short: Compressed air + actual whistle pipe, footswitch-triggered
projects.description_long: Real compressed air mini steam whistle. Actual whistle pipe (not a sample). Footswitch-triggered. Just for fun.
